field_notes.brand: The official packet uses BrandPayload as the smallest known CustomPacketPayload supported by ClientboundCustomPayloadPacket.CONFIG_STREAM_CODEC; the generated answer owns the resulting payload id and bytes.

stop_boundary: Proves Configuration clientbound custom_payload packet framing and dispatch/decode for one official BrandPayload fixture only; do not infer arbitrary plugin-channel handling, payload routing policy, Configuration completion, registry hydration, Play entry, or runtime behavior.
